subject: [PATCH v6 12/22] swap: implement the swap_cgroup API using virtual swap

2026-05-05.patch_summary: This patch implements the swap_cgroup API using virtual swap, which allows for dynamic allocation of memory overhead for swap cgroup information. This reduces the memory overhead in large but sparsely used swap spaces by only allocating memory when needed. The patch removes static arrays and instead stores swap entries' cgroup information in the swap descriptor. It also introduces a new function to record swap cgroup information, __swap_cgroup_record, which is called from the virtual swap cluster allocation code.
